summary: The diff implements REQ-1 (sign out fix in AppHeader.tsx and AppSidebar.tsx) and REQ-3 (selective localStorage clearing in DeleteAccountDialog.tsx) correctly. However, REQ-2 requiring changes to backend/main.mo to prevent cascade-deletion of complaints on account deletion is not present in the diff — no backend file was modified.

missing_requirements.requirement: Update the backend account deletion logic in backend/main.mo so that when a user profile is deleted, the user's complaints remain in the system and are NOT removed.
missing_requirements.reason: The diff shows no modifications to backend/main.mo or any backend file. The cascade-delete behavior on user account deletion has not been addressed at the backend level.
